history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A black-and-white photo shows a person seated while playing an electric guitar in front of an ornate backrest with a flower arrangement on the wall behind.

Main Subject:
A person with short, dark hair is seated and looking down at an electric guitar, holding the neck with one hand and strumming or holding the body area with the other. The person wears a dark long-sleeve shirt with small light lettering across the chest and dark shorts, and their posture leans slightly forward as they play.

Setting:
The scene is indoors with a plain light-colored wall in the background. Behind the seated person, an ornate carved wooden backrest with decorative patterns spans across the middle of the image. Above the person’s head, there is a wall-mounted or hanging rectangular container holding a bouquet of flowers with dark leaves and light, clustered blossoms.

Visual Details:
The camera angle is slightly elevated and angled toward the person’s torso and hands. The guitar is light-colored with a dark pickguard, visible pickup area, and multiple metal strings and tuning knobs on the headstock (partially out of view). The lighting is soft and even, creating clear contrast typical of a monochrome photograph. The flower bouquet includes dark foliage and white blossoms, arranged in a dense top-heavy cluster. The ornate woodwork behind appears carved with repeating floral or circular motifs.

Visible Text:
“fommy time” is visible on the shirt, though the exact lettering is unclear.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a seated person playing a light-colored electric guitar indoors. A decorative carved wooden backrest and a wall-mounted bouquet of dark leaves and light flowers are visible behind them.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A black and white, medium shot photograph of a young Asian man with dark, messy hair, wearing a black t-shirt with the words "funny rule" printed in a gothic font, sitting on a carved wooden chair and playing a white electric guitar. His gaze is focused downwards on the guitar as his fingers strum the strings and fret the neck. The background features a white wall with a wooden planter box mounted high up, filled with artificial green leaves and white flowers. The chair he is sitting on has intricate wood carvings and a patterned cushion. The lighting is soft and diffused, casting subtle shadows and highlighting the textures of the wood and fabric, creating a moody and intimate atmosphere. The overall style is realistic with a touch of artistic flair.
